heading: Grants to upgrade agriculture and food sciences facilities at the District of Columbia land-grant university
label: 3222b–1 Grants to upgrade agriculture and food sciences facilities at the District of Columbia land-grant university
notes: References in TextSection 208 of the District of Columbia Public Postsecondary Education Reorganization Act (; ), referred to in subsec. (a), is not classified to the Code.Public Law 93–47188 Stat. 1428

amendments: References in TextSection 208 of the District of Columbia Public Postsecondary Education Reorganization Act (; ), referred to in subsec. (a), is not classified to the Code.Public Law 93–47188 Stat. 1428

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: a Purpose
children.text: It is the intent of Congress to assist the land-grant university in the District of Columbia established under section 208 of the District of Columbia Public Postsecondary Education Reorganization Act (; ) in efforts to acquire, alter, or repair facilities or relevant equipment necessary for conducting agricultural research.Public Law 93–47188 Stat. 1428

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $750,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2012.
